info.description: Backend API for the Synapse Study Assistant.
info.title: Synapse API

post.summary: Exchange refresh token for a new token pair

post.description: Register a new user with email and password

get.description: Get details of a specific card

post.description: Upload an attachment for a card

get.description: Get a paginated list of decks for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by folder or tag

post.description: Create a new deck with a name, optional description, and optional folder ID

get.description: Get details of a specific deck
Get a paginated list of cards for a specific deck

post.description: Create a new card in a specific deck

get.description: Get the number of cards currently due for review in a specific deck
get.summary: Get due count for a deck

get.description: Download a deck's cards as a CSV file

post.description: Import flashcards into a specific deck from a CSV file

get.description: Get learning statistics for a specific deck

post.description: Attach one or more tags to a specific deck

get.description: Download all folders, decks, cards, and study logs for the authenticated user as a JSON file
get.summary: Export all user data to JSON

get.description: Get a list of all folders for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new folder with an optional parent folder ID

get.description: Get details of a specific folder

put.description: Update a folder's name or parent directory

get.description: Get the learning activity over a specified number of days
Get a forecast of upcoming reviews for the next few days
Get overall learning statistics for the current user

post.description: Start a new study session for a deck in a specific mode (review, cram, quiz)
Submit an answer rating for a card in an active study session

get.description: Fetch the next batch of due cards for an active session
get.summary: Get next due cards for session

post.description: End an active study session and save progress

get.description: Retrieve the scorecard and wrong answer details for a completed quiz session
Get a list of all tags for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new tag for organizing decks

interval.description: SRS scheduling fields (initialised on first study)

github_com_synapse_server_internal_domai.description: A data-point representing learning activity for a specific day
Breakdown of card mastery tiers for a specific deck
Projected review workload for a future date
Overall statistics for a user's library and study patterns

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL
